phaseGoal: Verify the Cloudflare Pages preview for the client website launch intake before production merge.

validationsExecuted.name: Cloudflare Pages preview
validationsExecuted.evidence: PR #15 cloudflare-pages-preview check completed successfully and deployed https://intake-portal.northvalleyintel-com.pages.dev.

validationsExecuted.name: Preview rendered-page smoke test
validationsExecuted.evidence: GET https://intake-portal.northvalleyintel-com.pages.dev/intake returned the Website Launch Intake page with required fields, optional photo upload, and optional technical section.

validationsExecuted.name: Preview API empty-submit smoke test
validationsExecuted.evidence: POST https://intake-portal.northvalleyintel-com.pages.dev/api/client-intake with no form data returned 400 and did not silently accept an incomplete intake.

validationsSkipped.name: successful preview delivery smoke test
validationsSkipped.reason: Avoided sending a real intake email from preview before production recipient confirmation.

validationsSkipped.name: live intake.northvalleyintel.com smoke test
validationsSkipped.reason: Pending production merge/deploy and Cloudflare Pages custom-domain configuration.

highFindings.summary: Preview is live, but intake.northvalleyintel.com still needs production custom-domain configuration and HTTPS smoke test.
